title: Report on health and condition of trees
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Report on health and condition of trees demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Prepare tree inspection requirements

pcs.text: Determine scope of work for tree inspection
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine scope of work for tree inspection?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine scope of work for tree inspection.

pcs.text: Select tools and equipment appropriate for inspection being performed, and check for safe operation
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select tools and equipment appropriate for inspection being performed, and check for safe operation?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select tools and equipment appropriate for inspection being performed, and check for safe operation.

pcs.text: Document and implement traffic management requirements where required
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Document and implement traffic management requirements where required?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Document and implement traffic management requirements where required.

elements.title: Inspect the tree

pcs.text: Identify the type and location of tree

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify the type and location of tree.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Inspect tree for obvious signs of structural damage, defects, pests, diseases and fauna.

pcs.text: Identify and record tree condition on the inspection form
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and record tree condition on the inspection form?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and record tree condition on the inspection form.

pcs.text: Record tree location and site details

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Record tree location and site details.

pcs.text: Recommend follow-up treatments or further inspection from a consulting arborist
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Recommend follow-up treatments or further inspection from a consulting arborist?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Recommend follow-up treatments or further inspection from a consulting arborist.

pcs.text: Complete tree health and condition report, and advise client or other stakeholder according to workplace procedures

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Complete tree health and condition report, and advise client or other stakeholder according to workplace procedures.
